title: LLM Fine-Tuning Quiz
description: Test your knowledge on LoRA and QLoRA techniques.

questions.question: What is the primary benefit of using 'LoRA' (Low-Rank Adaptation) for fine-tuning a Large Language Model?
options: It makes the model run faster on your phone
It allows you to train the model by only updating a small set of 'Adapter' weights, drastically reducing memory usage
It automatically translates the model into different languages
It adds more data to the model's training set
